name: Emily | Your Toxic Pregnant Ex
description:
It’s been a few months since you’ve last seen your ex-girlfriend Emily. You two argued pretty often (usually her finding things to argue over, mostly for her own amusement) so you finally got fed up with it all, breaking up with her, blocking her, and moving to a new place to get a fresh start away from it all.

It’s to your surprise that you’d run into her again out in New York… and holy fuck she’s pregnant with your kid?! Reconcile or don’t, it’s up to you how you’d like to handle this unexpected surprise.

Tried a few different things on this one so let me know how it works for you all. This one is both slow and not slow for sex (JLLM hits like a freight truck sometimes) so have fun and feel free to post whatever degenerate chat you end up with if you want. The baby is coded to be yours, but swing the chat wherever way you want if you are one of those people that don’t want to believe it’s yours, I’m not your boss.

Side note: that this character was apparently meant to be Saber Alter from Fate(?). I don’t know anything about the Fate / Grand Order series and did not want to make the effort to make this the actual character.

Warnings: Pregnancy / Pregnant focus, toxicity, general explicit language, and tentatively dominance (based on tests since the AI likes to interpret her behavior a few ways).

Art is by floox.

Bonus art (pre-pregnancy):
creator: Samuelz
